prepared_text:
Cochin Shipyard Limited 
Q4FY19 Earnings Call 
Invites to discuss the company’s Q4FY19 results and the road ahead 
Monday, 27th May, 2019 at 2:30 P.M. IST 
Cochin Shipyard Limited, a forerunner in the Indian Shipbuilding & Ship Repair 
industry, will organize a conference call for investors and analysts on Monday, 27th 
May, 2019 at 2:30 P.M. to discuss the company’s Q4FY19 financial performance. 
Shri Madhu. S. Nair, Chairman and Managing Director, will represent Cochin 
Shipyard Ltd. on the call.  
The financial results are available on the exchanges and corporate website - 
www.cochinshipyard.com  
The earnings call is being hosted jointly by Reliance Securities and Concept Investor 
Relations. 
 
DETAILS OF THE CONFERENCE CALL 
 
 
Timing 
2:30 P.M. IST on 27th  May,2019 
Conference dial-in Primary number 
+91 22 6280 1381  
+91 22 7115 8282 
Local Access Number 
+91-7045671221 
Hong Kong Toll Free Number 
800964448 
Singapore  Toll Free Number 
8001012045 
UK Toll Free Number 
08081011573 
USA Toll Free Number 
 
18667462133 

 
 
About Cochin Shipyard Limited 
Cochin Shipyard Limited, incorporated in 1972, is a fully owned Government of India (GOI) 
company and has been rated excellent by GOI five times in a row for achieving the targets set for 
the yard under the MOU system. The company is a leading shipbuilding & repair yard in India, 
which has an infrastructure that combines economy, scale, and flexibility, and has ISO 9001 
accreditation. Cochin Shipyard Ltd commenced ship repair operations in the year 1978 and has 
undertaken repairs of all types of ships including up-gradation of ships of oil exploration industry 
as well as periodical layup repairs and life extension of ships of Navy, UTL, Coast Guard, Fisheries 
and Port Trust besides merchant ships of SCI & ONGC. It caters to clients engaged in the defense 
sector in India and commercial sector worldwide. Cochin Shipyard Ltd is the largest public sector shipyard 
in India in terms of dock capacity, as of March 31, 2015, according to the CRISIL Report. The company has 
also been conferred the 'Miniratna' status in 2008, by the Department of Public Enterprises, GOI. Cochin 
Shipyard has secured shipbuilding orders from internationally renowned companies from Europe & 
Middle East and is nominated to build the country’s first indigenous Air Defense Ship. In addition to 
shipbuilding and ship repair, Cochin Shipyard Ltd also offers marine engineering training.   
 
 
For more information contact: 
 
Kala V (CS)                                                Arafat Saiyad                                                  Gaurav Girdhar                                  
Cochin Shipyard Ltd                                 Reliance Securities 
                                Concept IR            
 
Tel: +91 484 2501306                                 Tel: +91 022-33034635 / 9819503007            Tel: +91 7798232425                                                 
Fax: +91 (484) 238400                              Email: Arafat.saiyad@relianceada.com    Email: gaurav.g@conceptpr.com                          
E-mail: kala.v@cochinshipyard.com                                                                                                                                                                  
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
CIN:  U63032KL1972GOI002414 
Regd. Oﬃce: Administrative Building, Cochin Shipyard Premises, Perumanoor, Kochi - 682015 Kerala, India. 
Phone: +91 (484) 2501306; Fax No.: +91 (484) 2384001 
Email: secretary@cochinshipyard.com; Website: www.cochinshipyard.com
